title: August 21
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|August}}
'''August 21''' is the 233rd day (234th on leap years) of the year. There are 132 days remaining.
</noinclude>
*[[1920s#1929|1929]] – [[Marie Severin]] is born.
*[[1960s#1964|1964]] – [[Susan Eisenberg]] is born.
*[[1960s#1967|1967]] – [[Carrie-Anne Moss]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly 130|''The Empire Strikes Back Weekly'' 130]] published.
*[[1981]] - [[Eddie Byrne]] dies.
*[[1996]] – [[Classic Star Wars: Devilworlds 1|''Classic Star Wars: Devilworlds'' 1]] published.
*[[2002]] – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 34|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 34]] published.
*[[2008]] – A demo for ''[[Star Wars: The Force Unleashed]]'' is released for download on Xbox LIVE and Playstation Network.
*2008 – ''[[Star Wars: Visions of the Blade]]'' published online.
*[[2013]] – [[Darth Vader and the Ninth Assassin 5|''Darth Vader and the Ninth Assassin'' 5]] published.
*2013 – [[Dark Times—A Spark Remains 2|''Dark Times—A Spark Remains'' 2]] published.
*[[2014]] – ''[[Star Wars: Commander]]'' released for iOS and other mobile platforms.
*[[2018]] – [[Star Wars Insider 183|''Star Wars Insider'' 183]] published.
*[[2019]] – [[TIE Fighter 5|''TIE Fighter'' 5]] published.
*2019 – [[Doctor Aphra (2016) 35|''Doctor Aphra'' (2016) 35]] published.
*2019 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2017) 24|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2017) 24]] published.
*[[2024]] – [[Star Wars (2020) 49|''Star Wars'' (2020) 49]] published.
*2024 – [[The High Republic Adventures (2023) 9|''The High Republic Adventures'' (2023) 9]] published.
**The digital release for ''The High Republic Adventures'' 9 instead delivered fans [[The High Republic Adventures – Echoes of Fear 1|''The High Republic Adventures – Echoes of Fear'' 1]].
<noinclude>
